Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Hey man, I'm gonna get some ramen after school. You wanna come?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}No reason, really. Just don't have anything to do later.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Plus I figured we could finish our chat from this morning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}So how 'bout it, man? Let's get some ramen at the mall and talk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm going to hang out with[n]my classmate after school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}According to Igor, the strength of a[n]Social Link is the strength of a Persona.[n]{f 1 1}
